privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic blood donation data with 6 donations of 4 types (Whole Blood, Platelets, Plasma, Double Red Cells) in mixed date formats (YYYY-MM-DD and MM/DD/YYYY). Standard medical waiting periods are: Whole Blood 56 days (8 weeks), Platelets 7 days, Plasma 28 days, and Double Red Cells 112 days (16 weeks). The task requires agents to add columns using DAYS() and TODAY() functions for days since donation, nested IF() formulas for waiting periods, eligibility logic, and date arithmetic. Pass threshold is 70% (4 of 6 criteria: columns present, correct formulas, calculation accuracy ±1 day, eligibility logic, zero formula errors, date formatting). Task difficulty is medium with 180-second timeout and maximum 15 steps.
